chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-1010 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing of Case. 1. For orders on Misc. No.7140/2025 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on Misc. No.6621/2025 4. For hearing of main case. 17.11.2025. Mr. S. Qamar Abbas, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Zardari, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Ms. Rahat Ahasan, DPG ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for the petitioner through instant petition seeks following relief:- A)TO DECLARE that the illegal detention, extortion, and harassment of the petitioner by the Respondent No.5 to 8 is illegal, malafide and unconstitutional; B) RESTRAININ ORDER; Restrain the Respondent No. 5 to 8 from harassing, threating or taking any coercive action against the petitioner in any manner whatsoever without due course of law; C) TO DIRECT the Respondent No.5 to 8 to return the above mentioned six cheques amounting Rs.55,00,000/- which were forcibly took from the petitioner; D) Any other relief or relief(s) which this Honourable Court, may deem, fit and proper under the circumstances of the Petition. In prayer clause ‘C’, the petitioner seeks the return of his six cheques which were taken from him, petition to that extent is not maintainable before this Court therefore dismissed. As far as the allegation of harassment is concerned, the official respondent SHO, PS Gulberg Town, Karachi has filed an undertaking stating that the police shall conduct strictly in accordance with the law and shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner.

In prayer clause ‘C’, the petitioner seeks the return of his six cheques which were taken from him, petition to that extent is not maintainable before this Court therefore dismissed. As far as the allegation of harassment is concerned, the official respondent SHO, PS Gulberg Town, Karachi has filed an undertaking stating that the police shall conduct strictly in accordance with the law and shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner. Learned AAG and DPG also submits that in terms of prayer clause official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and no harassment shall be caused to the petitioner. Counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the instant petition in view of the reply filed by the official respondent and statement made by the AAG & DPG. Order accordingly. A copy of this order shall be sent to SSP (Central) Karachi for compliance. JUDGE
